title: Fig. 3 in Trichinella pseudospiralis in a wolverine (Gulo gulo) from the Canadian North

description: Fig. 3. Geographic locations of this and previously published reports of Trichinella pseudospiralis confirmed by multiplex PCR in North America (Lindsay et al., 1995., Gamble et al., 2005; Gajadhar and Forbes, 2010; Reichard et al., 2015, 2017).
